top_signals.title: China Should Capitalize On This Trend
top_signals.summary: China had fewer tourists than Saudi Arabia last year. To bring back visitors, the country should make the most of the Chinamaxxing movement, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist Juliana Liu. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Emerging Market Stocks Set for Weekly Loss as AI Trade Wobbles
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market stocks headed for their biggest weekly decline since early March, weighed down by a renewed technology selloff that hammered South Korean shares.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
